name: FOXO TECHNOLOGIES INC.
summary: PART I Overview FOXO Technologies Inc., is a healthcare services and technology company. We currently operate three synergistic divisions, an epigenetics diagnostics and interpretation division, a rural hospital division, and a mental and behavioral health division. Our mission is to build healthier communities by encompassing technology and expertise to offer a diverse and adaptable range of healthcare services and solutions to improve the quality of healthcare and lives for those we serve.
